{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/90620429?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/al1z4deh", "id": 90620429, "login": "al1z4deh", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjkwNjIwNDI5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/al1z4deh", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65593", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:H/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Impact

Endpoints in `/rest/dynamic-node-parameters/` lacked authorization scopes, making it reachable by any authenticated user with no workflow creation or execution required.

By supplying an absolute URL in the routing configuration, a caller could override the node type's declared baseURL, defeating the restriction meant to confine requests to the node's own upstream service. With SSRF protection disabled by default (`N8N_SSRF_PROTECTION_ENABLED=false`), this let an authenticated user make the n8n server issue HTTP requests to arbitrary internal targets.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.64, 2.29.8, and 2.30.1. Users should upgrade to this version or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict n8n instance access to fully trusted users only.
- Set `N8N_SSRF_PROTECTION_ENABLED=true` to enable SSRF filtering for private IP ranges and cloud metadata endpoints.
- Restrict network egress from the n8n host to limit reachable internal services.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:01:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65593"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:01:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65593", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@1.123.64", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.29.8", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.30.1", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-ssrf-via-dynamic-node-parameters", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Authenticated SSRF via Dynamic Node Parameters Endpoints Allows Internal Network Access", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:01:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9w78-79q7-r4fp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.64", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.30.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.30.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.29.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Authenticated SSRF via Dynamic Node Parameters Endpoints Allows Internal Network Access
